rule_summary: Kept NULL numeric vitals, set invalid values to NULL, and added *_missing indicator columns.
Set NULL or empty chiefcomplaint and pain to 'Unknown'; kept missing acuity as NULL.
Removed rows where all numeric vital measurements are NULL; no time-series imputation performed.
Kept rhythm in cleaned_vital_sign as an observed text column with NULLs preserved; never impute missing rhythm as 'Normal'.
Removed rows where both icd_code and icd_title are NULL; missing titles became 'Unknown diagnosis'.
Removed rows where name, gsn, and med_rn are all NULL; medication names received basic text cleanup only.
Removed rows where name, gsn, ndc, and etcdescription are all NULL; medication names received basic text cleanup only.
